creator: kevans@freebsd.org
text:
Created attachment 209455
svn(1) diff against the ports tree

This port represents the to-be-released version of qemu-user-static for testing prior to unleashing it upon the community at large and the package building infrastructure. Currently, it is based on the bsd-user-rebase-3.1 branch that moves the base qemu version of this work forward.

The main highlight of the update to 3.1 is initial riscv64 bsd-user support, submitted by Embecosm.

This version of the port is also notably no longer based on the master port, qemu-sbruno, but repocopied from it due to reusing a good portion of it.

Q/A:
 * portlint: looks fine
 * testport: 11.3, -CURRENT; amd64
